news.title: Walmart (WMT) Secures Long Term Nuclear Power Deal With Constellation Energy
news.summary: Walmart has signed a long-term power purchase agreement with Constellation Energy to source emissions-free nuclear power for its U.S. operations. The wholesale nuclear supply is scheduled to begin in 2029 and is aimed at supporting Walmart’s cleaner energy goals.
